context: Agent must introduce an abstraction to make the ReportExporter open for extension without modification, and articulate the OCP violation

checklist.name: IReportFormatter interface produced
checklist.description: IReportFormatter.ts exists and exports an interface with at least a format or export method that takes data and returns a string

checklist.name: Three format implementations produced
checklist.description: CsvFormatter.ts, JsonFormatter.ts, and TsvFormatter.ts each exist and implement IReportFormatter

checklist.name: Refactored ReportExporter contains no format-specific logic
checklist.description: ReportExporter.ts has no if/else or switch on format string; it only delegates to the injected IReportFormatter

checklist.name: ReportExporter accepts formatter via constructor or method parameter
checklist.description: ReportExporter.ts receives an IReportFormatter instance as a constructor parameter or method argument

checklist.name: ocp-analysis.md correctly explains the violation and fix
checklist.description: ocp-analysis.md identifies the if/else chain as the violation and explains that the abstraction allows adding formats without editing existing files
